narrative:
Swancreek Liberty Center (precinct in Fulton County) has 869 registered voters, with 51.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 12.0 percentage points.
